title: Inmate convicted of killing another man by throwing gasoline at him and lighting a match is executed in Arizona
full_text:
Inmate convicted of killing another man by throwing gasoline at him and lighting a match is executed in Arizona
Inmate convicted of killing another man by throwing gasoline at him and lighting a match is executed in Arizona
ByThe Associated Press
May 20, 2026, 1:57 PM
FLORENCE, Ariz. -- Inmate convicted of killing another man by throwing gasoline at him and lighting a match is executed in Arizona.
